verified.name: GitHub Project Issues
verified.tagline: GitHub Project Issues — keyless JSON API
verified.description: GitHub Project Issues. This API allows you to retrieve issues associated with a specific GitHub repository using the owner's username and the repository name. It supports queries to get detailed information about different issues for improved project management.

verified.name: Jikan
verified.tagline: Unofficial MyAnimeList API
verified.description: MAL data without scraping. Respect 3 req/s; cache aggressively.

verified.name: Ignav Flight API
verified.tagline: Ignav Flight API — keyless JSON API
verified.description: Ignav Flight API. The Ignav API provides developers with access to flight prices and direct booking links. Users can search for one-way and round-trip fares across various routes and generate booking URLs for selected itineraries.

info.title: Ignav Public API
info.description: Public fare search, booking-link, and airport-search contract.

schema.title: Response Search Airports Api Airports Get

post.description: Get booking links for a specific itinerary.

verified.name: Parkleitsystem API
verified.tagline: Parkleitsystem API — keyless JSON API
verified.description: Parkleitsystem API. Provides real-time information on available parking spaces in connected parking garages in cities like Basel, Zurich, Bern, Luzern, St.Gallen, and Zug. Developed by Simon Jenny for the Pebble.Parking-App.

verified.name: Pokefact API
verified.tagline: Pokefact API — keyless JSON API
verified.description: Pokefact API. API chooses a random Pokemon fact and displays it to the user.

data: Remoraid can be seen as a parallel to Qwilfish. Both of them are Water-type Generation II Pokémon. Remoraid is exclusive to LeafGreen, while Qwilfish is exclusive to FireRed, with both Pokémon found in the same locations in their respective versions.

verified.name: REST API Beispiele
verified.tagline: REST API Beispiele — keyless JSON API
verified.description: REST API Beispiele. Dieses API bietet Beispiele für REST API Aufrufe, insbesondere für die HTTP Methoden POST, PUT und PATCH. Es dient als Anleitung, um Ressourcen zu erstellen, zu aktualisieren oder zu löschen, wobei ein Beispielservice verwendet wird.

apis.name: Shop API Showcase
apis.description: API for REST exploration, test and demonstration. Feel free to manipulate the resources using the POST, PUT and DELETE methods. This API acts as a showcase for REST API design.

apis.name: DLP API
apis.description: Data Loss Prevention API that can be queried with fieldnames.

verified.name: Rejection Reason Generator
verified.tagline: Rejection Reason Generator — keyless JSON API
verified.description: Rejection Reason Generator. This API provides a variety of random rejection and acceptance reasons, offering a creative and sometimes humorous take on the responses one might receive. Users can easily access specific reasons through various endpoints, making it a fun tool for generating feedback.

sampleJson.reason: That would be a dream come true. Too bad I'm awake and saying no.

verified.name: Remote OK Jobs API
verified.tagline: Remote OK Jobs API — keyless JSON API
verified.description: Remote OK Jobs API. Remote OK is the #1 remote-only jobs board on the web. It has over 30,000+ remote job listings, adding new ones every day. With this API, now you can build apps with our data feed which covers 80% of remote jobs on the web.

sampleJson.legal:
API Terms of Service: Please link back (with follow, and without nofollow!) to the URL on Remote OK and mention Remote OK as a source, so we get traffic back from your site. If you do not we'll have to suspend API access.

Please don't use the Remote OK logo without written permission as it's a registered trademark, please DO use our name Remote OK though.

verified.name: Remote Jobs API/RSS Feed
verified.tagline: Remote Jobs API/RSS Feed — keyless JSON API
verified.description: Remote Jobs API/RSS Feed. Description: Discover and integrate a diverse range of remote job listings with Jobicy's public API, RSS, and XML feeds. This API offers the latest remote job opportunities across various industries and regions, making it a valuable resource for developers and businesses looking to enhance their job feed platforms. Supports filters for job region, industry, and keywords to help you target specific job markets.

verified.name: SLA Uptime Calculator
verified.tagline: SLA Uptime Calculator — keyless JSON API
verified.description: SLA Uptime Calculator. The SLA Uptime Calculator API provides calculations for expected downtime based on specified uptime percentages. It supports both simple and complex calculations, allowing users to input downtime durations and receive corresponding SLA uptime percentages. Additionally, it can calculate acceptable downtime for different days of the week.

verified.name: Simpsons Character API
verified.tagline: Simpsons Character API — keyless JSON API
verified.description: Simpsons Character API. The Simpsons Character API provides detailed information about characters from The Simpsons universe, including their age, occupation, and famous quotes. It's designed for developers who want to create applications or services related to The Simpsons series.

verified.name: Shodan EntityDB API
verified.tagline: Shodan EntityDB API — keyless JSON API
verified.description: Shodan EntityDB API. The Shodan EntityDB API provides fast lookups for business entities, offering a centralized repository of financial overviews and executive information for entities listed in the US. Access critical financial metrics, analyze performance, and explore leadership teams to make informed investment decisions, conduct industry research, and connect with key decision-makers.

get.summary: Get Entity Information In Json Format
Get Entity Information In Json Format

verified.name: The Office API
verified.tagline: The Office API — keyless JSON API
verified.description: The Office API. This API provides access to detailed information regarding the popular television show 'The Office.' Users can retrieve data about seasons, characters, and episodes, including air dates and descriptions. The API is currently in early development, indicating that features may evolve over time.

verified.name: CheapShark API
verified.tagline: CheapShark API — keyless JSON API
verified.description: CheapShark API. CheapShark is a price comparison website for digital PC Games, tracking prices across multiple stores including Steam, GreenManGaming, and Fanatical. The API provides developers with access to CheapShark pricing data to integrate into their own applications or websites.

verified.name: Kimi Quotes API
verified.tagline: Kimi Quotes API — keyless JSON API
verified.description: Kimi Quotes API. The Kimi Quotes API provides access to a collection of quotes from Finnish Formula 1 driver Kimi Räikkönen, including team radio snippets and interview quotes. Users can easily retrieve random quotes to share or browse, enhancing the fan experience with memorable lines from the racing legend.

verified.name: PubMed E-utilities
verified.tagline: Search PubMed literature IDs
verified.description: NCBI E-utilities expose PubMed, PMC and gene search as JSON with retmode=json. No key at modest rates; include contact email in requests.

verified.name: Wahlumfragen Datenbank API
verified.tagline: Wahlumfragen Datenbank API — keyless JSON API
verified.description: Wahlumfragen Datenbank API. Die API von DAWUM stellt eine umfassende Datenbank für Wahlumfragen als JSON-Datei zur Verfügung. Sie ermöglicht den Zugriff auf aktuelle Umfrageergebnisse für verschiedene politische Parteien in Deutschland unter der Lizenz ODC-ODbL.

verified.name: TCGdex
verified.tagline: Multilingual Pokémon TCG card data
verified.description: Open Pokémon TCG database with cards, sets and rarities in many languages. Keyless JSON search and lookup — cache responses in production.
